entry.title: Re: Ledger Setup
entry.content: Thanks for the answer we, will have to tell the customer that in some companies there will be data redundance. Since we can not exclude the 2L in som company codes. All the best, Adam

entry.title: Re: Groovy Script Parse Error
entry.content: Hello Ryan, this is my first time raising a question here, glad to have very quick response. Thank you it worked actually but i am getting a different error now

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Recruiting - Job posted but cannot be...
entry.content: I would highly recommend raising a support ticket to investigate this. There could be multiple reasons for jobs not appearing on career portals, including configuration and database issues. The support team could investigate on your particular example and provide a solution.

entry.title: Re: Budget saving in Purchase Requests (PRs)
entry.content:
Hello, @sumesh_gupta,

Thank you for your response!

I understand there is no direct method to perform budgetary control using PRs/POs. However, when a PR receives an estimated budget in SAP, that amount is allocated to that specific PR. My question is: if a PO is created for one line of this PR with an amount smaller than the allocated amount for the PR, what happens to the remaining budget? Is it automatically available for use, or does SAP continue to lock the remaining budget to that PR until it's closed or until another action is taken?

Best regards,
Robert D.

entry.title: Re: Picking Status(Header) does not exist in EWM advanced...
entry.content: DB stores picking status at item level and header level is a calculated one. You can build custom reports as use standard PRD Query method to filter data by header status (dynamic)

entry.title: Re: Disable popup dialog when I am going to create a new...
entry.content: @MioYasutake I also have a valid from field which is key, how could I manage it so that it does not appear in the reaction dialog from my cap service?

entry.title: Re: recreate clustered indexes on huge table
entry.content: I recommend you to change the post tag to SAP IQ. In Datasphere IQ is not used and there is no possibility to manage indexes.

entry.title: How to trace purchase order number from sales order
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I know I can trace sales order number from purchase order number using ME23N Account Assignment.

My question is, can I do vice versa? Is there any transaction which I can trace down the purchase order by reffering the sales order?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Relaunching Integration Suite, Advanced Event Mesh – Repackaging Summary
entry.content: Hi Krishna, thank you for sharing the details of the SAP AEM relaunch! I understand that the access to SAP AEM on SAP BTP is by subscribing to the AEM standalone service/app. Is there any plan to move AEM into SAP Integration Suite subscription as a capability, similar like APIM, OC? Or will this SAP AEM be a standalone (separate from Integration Suite)) subscription for now?

entry.title: Re: B1 Service Layer - Uploading Attachments - Empty file
entry.content:
Hi Ankit,

The version is:

SAP B1 10.0 (10.00.191) FP 2202 - SQL version

Thanks, Kind Regards,
Claudio

entry.title: Creating a person responsible in S/4HANA to assign in maintenance Order in IW32
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created maintenance order in S/4HANA IDES system and want to assign person responsible in the order and I am not able to get any person responsible in the list. How to create person responsible so that it appears in the list and I can assign. 

Thanks and Regards

KVKUMAR

entry.title: Re: Is there a configuration guide for the latest applica...
entry.content: Tagging candidates is not yet supported with the redesigned applicant workbench. Please find more information about known limitations here: https://me.sap.com/notes/3369122/E

entry.title: Re: Business Activity Statement Report (BAS) for VAT Reporting
entry.content:
Another option,  but is for you to test, and ensure you have done a backup before, is to 'clear up' all the declarations of that Fiscal Year, by generating Replacement  of all of them by 'unchecking' absolutely all the documents.

Once there are no documents linked to any declarations on that fiscal year,  you can try to change the Reporting Period definition to the desired one, and do the declarations all over again.

Lots of work, though.

Jose

entry.title: Re: How to enable SAC story script editing for other users
entry.content: I have given the user full control. Also I made the other user as owner.

entry.title: Re: How to enable SAC story script editing for other users
entry.content: I have given the user full control. Also I made the other user as owner. But still only I am able to view and modify the script.

entry.title: some document is not showing in with_item
entry.content:
hello everyone,

when I excecated the report of WITH_ITEM some challan Number is not showing on that

is there any other way to find out that please reply

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Service integration with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (St Leon-Rot, DE)
entry.content: Hi Guys, @qmacro - is there any way to find out if one made it on the attendee list? Many thanks!

entry.title: EWM automatic staging change if order is changed in ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

We have setup system EWM so after production order release the automatic staging should be done in EWM system. Now I have a question if in APO order will be rescheduled or other change will be done is there a possibility that the staging in EWM will be adjusted?

Thanks

entry.title: Status DLV and CNF not set in production order after production order confirmation
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We confirm prod order with CO11N and reversal with CO13.

After that we confirm again with CO11N. Confirmation is success and there is material document too.

But in prod order status DLV and CNF is not set.

Why this can be happened?

What is solution for this condition?

 

Please help.

Thanks and regards,

Anita A.

entry.title: Re: Can a calibration templated be deleted
entry.content:
Hi renithaharriela , 

You can delete both Calibration Template and Calibration session easily ,just check your admin. permissions .below is the screenshot for your reference with delete button

Please mark this as answer so that others can use this information if it helps.

Thanks

Mridul

entry.title: BPFCTRA0 message 00 208 “Inconsistent assigned values have been found”
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

We still found message 00 208 “Inconsistent assigned values have been found”  in program BPFCTRA0. Although we had apply sap notes 1373559 - BPFCTRA0: Unauthorized message 00 208.

Why this can be happened?

What is solution for this case?

Is there newest SAP notes related this case than 1373559 ?

 

Please help.

Thanks and regards,

Anita A.

entry.title: How to Create Return order with reference to Billing doc using FM: SD_ADV_RETURNS_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

           I'm using  FM SD_ADV_RETURNS_CREATE to create a Return order. 

           The Reason , I want to use this FM is because it consists Return Reason, Follow up Activity,Refund Control, Cust.Insp.Code and Refund type fields and these are required fields.

But when I'm unable to figure out where Billing document number need to be filled. I have tried providing Billing doc no. in Document field. But system is throwing error "s sls_lord 006 invoice required as template"

Your help will be much appreciated.

Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: Re: print out column names
entry.content: Thank you so much. 😊

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP S/4HANA with Kafka via SAP Advanced Event Mesh: Part1 – Outbound connection
entry.content: Thanks @jayshukla and @rameez_khan 😊

entry.title: Bad sequence of luw from EWM to ECC
entry.content:
Hello,

Sometime ECC receive luw in a bad sequence from EWM.

For example we received an IBD modify before its create, So I save the first luw to intergrate the second.

Another example, on IBD we receive the move from ROD to AFS before receipt on ROD. So we buisness made inventory on EWM to add stock on ROD so the queue is unlock and after all luw are integrated on ECC they made a second inventory to delete the stock on ROD.

There is a custo or other to fix it ?

entry.title: Re: Hana2 sp7 - A calculation view has different behavior if used alone or in another view
entry.content: Did you check if the data in both environments is consistent? There might be some differences in the data that are causing this issue. Also, are the calculation view in both environments the same? There might be some differences in the calculation view that are causing this issue.

entry.title: Re: Transport Error (after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IM...
entry.content: Hi MKreitlein, We have tried to transport remodeling the DSO via t-code RSCNV_MONITOR, but the error pesists. We have tried to transport without HANA view thinking that could have been the problem, but still the error. I have attached the transport error message displayed. Thanks for the help!

entry.title: Re: Doing a Proof of Concept for BTP Application Monitoring with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Nic,

Thanks for response!
I will listen to this webcast. 

In meantime, I have already started with the mission and came across following link, which exactly addressed my PoC objective. OpenTelemetry for SAP BTP Apps with SAP Cloud ALM.

Announcement: https://news.sap.com/2023/11/sap-cloud-alm-extended-to-cover-sap-btp/

Documentation: https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/data-collection-infrastructure.html

This documentation link, I am able to follow till the High Level Architecture. Looks pretty similar common web analytics procedure... include certain libraries at UI layer, at Service layer and then it sends telemetry data to a server. 

I am now checking prerequisites and steps to be followed at SAP Cloud ALM side and into my sample BTP App developed using CAP model.

Looking for some guidance from section "Configure Settings with Download Link" onwards, as I am not a developer.

Warm regards,

Amey

entry.title: Automatic clearing of bank interim account for outgoing payments with reference number
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I certainly need some help from expert:

1. We have posted two normal vendor invoices to two different vendor accounts. After that we executed normal payment run. The open items on the vendor accounts are cleared with clearing document number 2000000006:

2. The payment run posted outgoing payments on bank interim account for outgoing payments:

3. The DME file is being send to the bank including the reference number which is also included in xml file:

 

4. Bank statement from bank is coming in and is being uploaded via FIORI App “Manage Incoming Payment Files”. It returns the reference number from payment run (in this case as MsgID and PmtInfId). As of my understanding it is sufficient if reference number is in field PmtInfId.

5. However, SAP will not automatically clear Bank against interim account for outgoing payments (bank ledger posting only:  De Bank interim outgoing – Cr Bank). Error protocol is telling me that “The difference is too large for clearing”. For me it looks like that SAP is not really finding the corresponding postings with DME information from payment run to clear the open item.

6. When I manually enter corresponding DME reference number in FEBAN, SAP will find the Open Items and can be cleared directly.

Question: Why is SAP not finding the correct open items or DME information from the payment run during automatic electronic bank statement processing? What might I be overlooking?

entry.title: Re: we are unable to see XSA role collections which get a...
entry.content: As I know, the SAP HANA XSA role collections are not directly visible or manageable in GRC, they needs to be managed within the XSA environment itself.

entry.title: solman admin cockpit - schedule import job missing
entry.content:
Hi All,

Suddenly we are not seeing schedule import jobs in Solman admin cockpit.  What authorization is required to get this tab in admin cockpit.  Thank you in advance.

 

Thanks,

Raghav

entry.title: 項目庫存在同法人不同工廠和利潤中心間做STO
entry.content:
印度不同邦間項目庫存移轉

場景：

同法人，不同邦，不同利潤中心，不同工廠，不同項目，不同WBS

需要開AP AR

如果進行STO作業

entry.title: Re: In SAP Hana Cloud, do packages exist as database obje...
entry.content: It looks, that SAP HANA Cloud does not have the concept of packages as database objects like Oracle does. In Oracle, a package is a schema object that groups logically related PL/SQL types, items, and subprograms.

entry.title: Re: In Application browsing in SAP MDK App
entry.content:
Hi Jitendra

I have created an extension to use NativeScript webview to achieve this. I want to open a Cloud Portal site in webview MDK. Is there a way to pass the authenticated user to the Cloud Portal site? Currently it takes me to the IDP login page.

entry.title: Re: we are unable to see XSA role collections which get a...
entry.content:
Hi HakanHaslaman

Thank you for clarifying my query. We are basically using a third party tool which has integration with GRC and as soon as someone requests access from this tool, GRC will trigger role assignements from its end. So, as we cannot see these XSA role collections in GRC, then we shall find a way to integrate XSA itself to this tool or write a custom auth I guess

entry.title: Re: I am looking for a report for Order Intake and Revenue.
entry.content:
Dears,

Share the blog for your reference:

https://blogs.sap.com/?p=1267572

Best regards,

Angela

entry.title: Re: Transport Error (after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IM...
entry.content: Please show all error messages - expand the [+]

entry.title: Re: CDS view Required - S4Hana Public Cloud MD04 - stock...
entry.content:
Well, we checked with SAP directly and they came up with note: https://me.sap.com/notes/3333633

We discovered that this API does the trick: https://api.sap.com/api/API_PRODUCT_AVAILY_INFO_BASIC/overview

Specifically: 

sap/opu/odata/SAP/API_PRODUCT_AVAILY_INFO_BASIC/DetermineAvailabilityAt?SupplyingPlant='1010'&Material='00000000000000001'&ATPCheckingRule='A'&RequestedUTCDateTime=datetimeoffset'2024-05-17T17:00:00Z'

Hope this helps other people 🙂

So, next stop is to find the CDS view behind it #dontthinkso

entry.title: Re: Replication flow in DataSphere not showing the extrac...
entry.content:
Hello,

CDS Views are exposed via folder CDS_EXTRACTION, not CDS.

If the folder CDS is showing and you are missing CDS_EXTRACTION, your system has not been patched at all. Please make sure to implement the TCI note for your release. It can be found easily by running report CNV_NOTE_ANALYZER_DI in the connected S/4HANA system. If the report is not available in your system, check SAP Note 3016862.

Best regards,
Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Transport Error (after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IM...
entry.content: Attached. Thanks MKreitlein!

entry.title: Re: Replication flow in DataSphere not showing the extrac...
entry.content: "3130827 - SAP Data Intelligence - ABAP Integration - SAP S/4HANA 2022" This is the central note for your release listing all available correction. If the support team is suggesting checking the note, it fits to my answer. Please make sure to implement all code corrections / downports we provided via TCIs.

entry.title: Is there a CDS View with VC material variant information?
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

We use to VC materials variants when creating sales orders，

and now I want to enhance it when saving sales orders.

So, may I ask which CDS view this information is in?

 

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Setting Priority for Workitems Dynamically in SAP Workflow
entry.content:
Hello everyone. 
I was reading this article and thinking how to accomplish the same suing cloud system. We are implementing SAP S/4 Hana Cloud system, and got a request from customer about exact same issue - editing the priorities of workitem for approvals. 

Please can anyone advise how to accomplish this in S/4HC? 

Best Regards, 

Oksana

entry.title: Re: How to change approval priorities for To-Dos in Home...
entry.content: Dear Support,

entry.title: Group Rating
entry.content:
Hi,

we are implementing Performance & Goals. So far we used, next to the privat goals, group goals that were assigned to every employee. At the end of the year, every employee received the same rating for this group goal. What is the easiest way to do this in the Performance & Goals module? We saw we could use Metric Lookup Ratings. But we would like to know if there are any other option? 

Thank you for your help.

Kind regards,

Adrian

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
Hi All,

Is Sample / FOC Invoice in-scope of E-invoice ? It is a Zero value billing, So! is it still required to be sent to the Portal ? The Guidelines do not mention anything about Sample / FOC invoicing. 

Pl. share if you have any updates on this Business Scenario

entry.title: How to include the WBS Element in the migration of the Service Contracts?
entry.content:
There is a requirement to migrate the assignment of WBS elements to the Service Contracts via the migration tool.... How can we do this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to include the WBS Element in the migration of th...
entry.content: For the inclusion of WBS elements within the Migration tool please refer to Enhanced Migration Object: Service Contract

entry.title: Re: How to change approval priorities for To-Dos in Home...
entry.content: Thank you Juan for the reply, I have checked the article, but it's not related to SAP S/4 Hana Cloud. Which is cloud system and for most configurations we do them either in a system called CBC or withing SAP S/4HanaCloud depending on configuration settings. Please if you know could you share info how to accomplish this settings in cloud systems such as S/4 Hana Cloud?

entry.title: Re: ADT: Documenting ABAP Development Objects
entry.content: Does anyone have some good examples how to document fx. CDS views

entry.title: Automate Assignment Profile changes
entry.content: We need to update certain rules in an assignment profile on a regular basis. Is there a way to automate this process via API or connector? There's a report called "AssignmentProfileAttributeDataAuditCSV" which would be an ideal basis for updating the rules in the profile. However, there's no way to upload that file and update the assignment profile. Has anyone found a solution for that?

entry.title: Re: Transport Error (after-import method RS_ODSO_AFTER_IM...
entry.content:
Hmm... unfortunately the same red lines show no text even if expanded.

Does a double-click on the exclamation mark give any other hint, or only RC=8 or RC=12?

You could try program RSDDB_LOGINDEX_CREATE for your DSO... but as of now I don't have any other idea.

Sorry... BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Multiple backround check (BC) implementation - SF ATS
entry.content:
Please also consider this as other possible options

https://me.sap.com/notes/2998326/E

Antonio

entry.title: Re: Ruby API returns different result based on same SQL b...
entry.content:
@jeff_albionThanks for trying to help.

I tried your example and it worked as long as the type was integer. As soon as I changed the SQL to use would use String it broke, see:

...
    sql = <<-END_SQL
            select 42 from "SYS"."DUMMY" where 'TestValue' = ?
        END_SQL
          item_code = 'TestValue'

          stmt = @@api.hanaclient_prepare @@connection, sql
          _, param = @@api.hanaclient_describe_bind_param(stmt, 0)
          param.set_value(item_code)
          @@api.hanaclient_bind_param(stmt, 0, param)
          _rc = @@api.hanaclient_execute(stmt)
          @@api.hanaclient_fetch_next( stmt )

          puts "R1: " + @@api.hanaclient_get_column(stmt, 0).to_s
          @@api.hanaclient_free_stmt(stmt)
...

Here it still should work as 'TestValue' = 'TestValue' would be true, yet it gets not result back:

10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] SQL COMMAND :             select 42 from "SYS"."DUMMY" where 'TestValue' = ?
10:13:01 web.1             | 
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] ENCODING    : UTF8
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::getClientInfo (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192786)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=0x00007e6270061cb8
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >PreparedStatement::resetParametersProcessed (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192788)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >ParseInfo::selectPhysicalConnection (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192791)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::selectPhysicalConnection (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192795)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] locationIndex=4294967295
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] isUpdateCommand=0
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::getPrimaryConnection (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192798)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=1
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=1
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=1
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >PreparedStatement::resetResults (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192803)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Statement::resetResults (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192804)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] clearResultSet=1
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::getWorkloadReplayContext (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192807)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] m_workloadReplayContext=
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] STATEMENTID    : STATEMENT[C22CE9B2325B0500(1507648191671490):1]
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] INPUT PARAMETERS
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] APPLICATION
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] INDEX TYPE       AT LENGTH        INDICATOR     DATA
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >PreparedStatement::checkInitParameters (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192815)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::getRequestPacket (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192818)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] packetsize=0

10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >RequestPacket::addSegment (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192821)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >RoutingInfo::addRoutingInfoPart (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192829)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >PreparedStatement::executeFillDirectData (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192833)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] haslobs=0
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] startindex=1

10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK

10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] 
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::sqlaexecute_clientconnection (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192873)

10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   SERVER CONNECTION ID: 351026

10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   VOLUME ID           : 3
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   SESSION ID          : 1647312013039303

10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   LAST RECEIVE TIME   : 2024-05-17 10:13:01.192421

10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >SimpleClientSocket::doPollBeforeSendToDetectSocketDead (2024-05-17 10:13:01.192891)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] SEND TIME: 151 USEC, MESSAGE: EXECUTE
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >SocketCommunication::receive (2024-05-17 10:13:01.193060)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] RECV TIME: 48413 USEC
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::doProcessReply (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241524)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >ReplySegment::getSQLDiag (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241528)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=false
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::updateTopology (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241532)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK

10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::processImplicitXASession (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241540)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] requestMessageType=EXECUTE
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::updateTransactionStatus (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241544)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] connectionId=1
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] action=TA_READTRANS
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] TRANSACTION ACTION TA_READTRANS
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] TRANSACTION:
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   STATE: READ TRANSACTION
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   PRIMARY: 1
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   TRANSACTION MEMBERS (READ): [1]
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   TRANSACTION MEMBERS (WRITE): []
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   TRANSACTION MEMBERS (WRITE CANDIDATE): []
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   TRANSACTION MEMBERS (WRITE TXN AS OF LAST REPLY) : []
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   HINT ROUTED CONNECTIONS: []
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] TRANSACTION UPDATED:
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] TRANSACTION:
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   STATE: READ TRANSACTION
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   PRIMARY: 1
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   TRANSACTION MEMBERS (READ): [1]
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   TRANSACTION MEMBERS (WRITE): []
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   TRANSACTION MEMBERS (WRITE CANDIDATE): []
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   TRANSACTION MEMBERS (WRITE TXN AS OF LAST REPLY) : []
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   HINT ROUTED CONNECTIONS: []
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::updateStatementContextFromReply (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241559)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] SERVER STATISTICS UPDATE OF [0x00007e627006a3a0]
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   PROCESSING TIME INCREASED TO 170 BY 170 USEC
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   CPU TIME INCREASED TO 99 BY 99 USEC
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC]   PEAK MEMORY USAGE INCREASED TO 0 BY 0 BYTES
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Statement::parseResult (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241573)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >Connection::getWorkloadReplayContext (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241575)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] m_workloadReplayContext=
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] RESULTSET ID:RESULT[C22CE9B2325B0500:1]
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] parseResult parsing ResultSet
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] *** ROW NOT FOUND ***

 

So we end up in a SegFault if I try to access a non existing Row that should be here:

10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] ::FETCH NEXT SQLCURS_1 RESULT[C22CE9B2325B0500:1] [0x00007e627006bbb0] 2024-05-17 10:13:01.241744
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >ResultSet::assertNotClosed (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241745)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >ResultSet::executeFetchNext (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241747)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >ResultSet::assertValid (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241748)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_NO_DATA_FOUND
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_NO_DATA_FOUND
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >ResultSet::getResultCount (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241751)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] 
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] ::GET RESULT COUNT SQLCURS_1 RESULT[C22CE9B2325B0500:1] [0x00007e627006bbb0]
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] COUNT:0
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >ResultSet::assertValid (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241753)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=SQLDBC_OK
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <=0
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >ConnectionItem::applicationCheckWarnings (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241756)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] ::APPLICATION CHECKING WARNINGS ON CONNECTIONITEM [0x00007e627006bbb0]
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] m_diag.warns=
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] >ConnectionItem::applicationCheckError (2024-05-17 10:13:01.241761)
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] ::APPLICATION CHECKING ERROR ON CONNECTIONITEM [0x00007e627006bbb0]
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] m_diag.errs=
10:13:01 web.1             | [SQLDBC] <
10:13:01 web.1             | /...REDACTED.../hana/hana_query.rb:100: [BUG] Segmentation fault at 0x0000000000000010
10:13:01 web.1             | ruby 3.3.1 (2024-04-23 revision c56cd86388) [x86_64-linux]

And its libSQLDBCHDB 2.20.20.1712178305  version exactly.

entry.title: Re: Ruby API returns different result based on same SQL but prepared vs execute_direct

entry.title: Re: I am looking for a report for Order Intake and Revenue.

entry.title: Display two related tables in a section of an object page fiori elements app
entry.content:
Hello experts, my client has the requirement to display in one section two tables that are related, so that when selecting one the elements related to it are seen in the following way

I would like to first know if it can be done without creating a custom section and if not, how can I bind the id in the custom so that it is filtered by the one I select?

entry.title: Re: Lessons learned from successful S/4HANA transformation projects
entry.content:
Hi, I missed this webinar, Can you please send me the link for recording of this important session.

Regards, 

Rehan

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi all, glad to have joined the community! Looking forward to contribute.

entry.title: Re: Homepage banner sizing with 1H 2024 release
entry.content:
Hi Mireille & Brandon, wow what a strange decision by SAP - the design of the banner in 2H 2023 was a great improvement so it's so strange that they're reverting back. Very frustrating as well that they haven't even communicated it in the What's New Viewer (unless I've missed it). It's amusing as well that they still have the "incorrect" version on the admin guide for managing the latest home page...

I would love the ability to go back to the 2H 2023 version so have raised the influence request below to recommend that they provide customers the option:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/323063

entry.title: Re: PO7.5 Node functions
entry.content: You can use the standard mapping steps of the graphical message mapping editor, like the "if-then-else" and the "concat", to achieve this easily. Or you write some Java code in a UDF. Whatever you prefer.

entry.title: How to send email the list report output as attachment in SAP RAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I am wondering a cleaner and better way of sending the list report output as attachment in email in SAP RAP. The problem is that user can filter out the result of list report from the filters in selection screen. So, suppose the BO returns 1000 material records without filter. If I filter with material, I get 20. So, I need a button - 'Send Email' upon clicking which, those 20 records must be sent in attachment of the email.

Below are the approaches I have in my mind, but none of them feel clean to me -

  1. Instance based action: We must select records to send as attachment. No customer would want that.
  2. Static action: We cannot get any filters in importing parameter of the action, so we would need to store filters or the filtered records in a staging table and write code in action to send the filtered records accordingly.
  3. Button adding with UI5: UI5 developer can fetch the filters and make use of them. Even if we add a button in UI5, it will need an OData service to pass the filters to the OData and the OData must be able to handle the importing parameters like passing selected materials as comma separated string and in the static parametric action, write logic to separate materials and process create the final record. Too much trouble for both front-end and back-end developer.

What else can we do? Why there is no way to get filters in a custom action the way we get in custom query provider class through IO_REQUEST?

entry.title: Re: Everything you need to know about: SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub
entry.content:
Hi @RinkyKarthik ,

Thank you for the clear information and different blogposts, really helpful!

We have been upgraded automatically to the TIH, in the preview environment. We are currently testing the different features out. However we would also like to do a Instance Refresh copy from our production environment. Can you please provide us with some more information on what the impact on the Talent Intelligence Hub will be in this case?

Thank you in advance for your feedback! 

Elissa

entry.title: How to change the IAS of SAP Cloud ALM to one belonging to a different customer number
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to change the IAS of Cloud ALM to another one.
But I cannot find the expected one when I try to select it in "Trust configuration" -> Custom Identify Provider for Applications field in BTP.

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change the IAS of SAP Cloud ALM to one belongi...
entry.content:
Hello Customer,

For one IAS tenant belongs to a different customer number under the same parent company, it is possible to add it by trusting it firstly in the current IAS following the help link: reuse the SAP Cloud Identity Services Tenants for Different Customer IDs.

  1. Sign in to the administration console for SAP Cloud Identity Services.
  2. Under Applications and Resources, choose the Tenant Settings tile.

    At the top of the page, you can view the administrative and license relevant information of the tenant.

  3. Under General, choose the Tenant Settings and Information list item.
  4. From the drop-down under the Additional Settings, choose the customer or customers that will reuse the configurations of the tenant you are in now.

    The Customer records drop-down contains only the customer ID numbers that are assigned to the global ultimate (the most important company within the corporate family).

After that,  you will be able to see the expected IAS under "trust configuration" in BTP.

Best regards
Ellie
SAP Support

entry.title: GL document journal for ALV report
entry.content:
Dears,

Does anyone know if there is any standard transaction code that can download the GL document journal as an ALV report?

The format should be like this:

I tried the GL line item (FBL3N or FAGLL03), but it only shows the account type with S; 

and some S_ALR reports about the document journal, but there is no ALV format I think.

Is there any idea to get the report as I want?

Thanks a lot.

BR,

Josie

#SAP FI

#GL document journal

entry.title: Please teach me how to Mapping Function [counter]
entry.content:
Hellow, Every one.
My Name is Shuto Suzuki.

Please teach me how to Mapping Function [counter].


When I actually tried setting the mapping definition as above, the output result for ① was 202.
This can be understood by saying,
　``The value of [Increment] was added to the value of [Initial Value] for the number of calls of [counter].''


However, regarding ②, in parts (1) and (2) of the image,
I thought that both would be 420 because "counter" was called twice,
but the result was 210 for both.

Not only the above example ,even other simple mapping examples is okey.
Please teach me about to know how the "counter" function works.

example)
With this kind of mapping, [Initial Value] is this value and [Increment] is this value, so it is calculated like this and the output result is like this.  etc

Best Regards.

entry.title: withholding tax reports
entry.content:
Are withholding tax reports available in S/4HANA public cloud?
For example, a report that displays line items with withholding tax codes.
This is a Japanese requirement.

entry.title: Re: Process order settlement
entry.content:
Hi @ssaher412 

There are a few checks you can do. Assuming that the process order type is to be settled fully, the balance on an order should be 0 in KOB1 if it has been settled correctly. You should see settlement lines with Reference Procedure = AUAK if settlement is done. An order should be in status DLV or TECO to allow settlement to happen.

There is a mass processing transaction for process orders, COHVPI. You can use this to select orders according to status or selection profile, or over a certain age, and perform closing or deletion flag (deletion flag is important for performance reasons).

Regards

Finbar

entry.title: How to Connect Business User Group to Business Role group?
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP Community, 

In s4 Hana public cloud i can creat Business User Group and Business Role Group. It would make a lot of Sense to Assign these Groups to each other, to minimize Administration work. 

So my Question is: Is it Possible to Assign a Bussines User group to a Business Role Group?

Context:  Solved: Is it possible to restrict which Business Role is ... - SAP Community

This functionality is the Maintain Business User Groups and Maintain Businsess Role Groups.

With Maintain Business User Groups app you can create business user groups and assign multiple business users to them. This helps you to organize your area and easily search for all business users of a certain category (for example to assign them to business roles). Grouping also facilitates maintenance of authorizations. If you are the super administrator for all areas, you can delegate this task to administrators for the relevant areas, such as Financials. In this case, you would create a business user group for Financials.

With Maintain Business Roles Groups app you can create business role groups and assign multiple business roles to them. This helps you to organize your area and easily search for all business roles of a certain category (for example to assign business users to them). Grouping also facilitates maintenance of authorizations. If you are the super administrator for all areas, you can delegate this task to administrators for the relevant areas, such as Financials. In this case, you would create a business role group for Financials and allow to assign these business roles only to particular user groups. 

 

For more information, you can check the following documentations:

SAP Blog Post | How to use the Maintain Business User Groups functionality

SAP Blog Post | How to use the Maintain Business Role Groups functionality

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - dynamic Average
entry.content: Hello William, many thanks for the quick response. I'm trying to adjust my formula.

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - dynamic Average
entry.content: Hello William, many thanks for the quick response. I'm trying to adjust my formula.BR

entry.title: Deletion of material groups
entry.content: In the baseline activation Service, several Materials Groups have been identified. These MG are no longer necessary and are causing confusion for the end users. I've seen this issue discussed in the SAP community "How can we delete a material group?", but this question is already years ago. Is it possible to delete these material groups?

We found that probably we can use OData, there is any other "standard" way suggested by SAP ?

Thanks!

Alberto

Hi

I have an "InterfaceDetermination did not yield any actual interface" with my REST sender. I really cannot get it. 

Log says:

What am i missing here?

entry.title: Re: How to rename a file which contains space in the file name using FTP_COMMAND FM?
entry.content:
Please help.

This is my code.

 CALL FUNCTION FTP_COMMAND
        EXPORTING
          handle        = w_hdl
          command       = p_lv_cmd
        TABLES
          data          = it_result
        EXCEPTIONS
          tcpip_error   = 1
          command_error = 2
          data_error    = 3
          OTHERS        = 4.

What i have to pass in parameter   command       = p_lv_cmd as i am receiving XML file here

entry.title: Re: Problem in using FTP_COMMAND
entry.content:
Please help.

This is my code.

 CALL FUNCTION FTP_COMMAND
        EXPORTING
          handle        = w_hdl
          command       = p_lv_cmd
        TABLES
          data          = it_result
        EXCEPTIONS
          tcpip_error   = 1
          command_error = 2
          data_error    = 3
          OTHERS        = 4.

What i have to pass in parameter   command       = p_lv_cmd as i am receiving XML file here

entry.title: FSM: Reopen a closed activity
entry.content:
Hello all,
is it possible to re-open a closed activity in FSM? Business Background to add times or smartforms. 

I didn't find an option in the FSM software to reopen a closed activity, therefore I assume that this is not possible. But just to make sure I'm not missing anything, here's a question for the community. 

Probably a new second activity needs to be created.

Best regards,
Deborah

entry.title: Re: Changes to DDIC not reflected in SE16N
entry.content: I think /$SYNC its work for me.. and this solution is perfect to my issue

entry.title: Re: Order Reservation number linked to sales order
entry.content:
Hello @primax12 

Unless you work in MTO environment, there is no direct static link between a procurement MRP element (planned order, purchase requisition, production order, purchase order etc.) and corresponding requirements. 

However, you can identify corresponding requirements with the pegging function - SAP Help Pegged Requirements

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Pegged requirment issue MD_PEGGING_NODIALOG returned without pegged requirement
entry.content: When call  MD_PEGGING_NODIALOG , it returend not pegged records, attached excel item 17 and 18, how to exclude these records from the pegged requirement?

entry.title: how to get the selected filter member
entry.content:
Hi!
I need to read the selected element in a filtered hierarchy using SAC scripting.

Something like this:

  • All
    • (x) North
      • North-East
      • North-West
    • South
      • South-East
      • South-West


My script returns an array containing "All, North, North-East, North-West" using:

var sel_pcr = InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().getActiveSelectedMembers();

I only need "All, North" (might be on a different hierarchy layer!). Can anyone tell me how to determine the selected item?

 

Thx Stefan

entry.title: Appgyver not send "Cookie" key in header
entry.content:
Hi folks,

Appgyver not sent "Cookie" key in header, so in this case is impossible to work with service layer...

There are any workaround for this case?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Usage of Function module /SPE/DELV_RESET_DIST_STATUS to change the delivery distribution status
entry.content:
@damaverick Please notice that the function reverses distribution status not only for EWM managed deliveries. That works also for LE-IDW integration.

I do agree, that the function mustn't be used in production environments, but it proves useful when testing integration, especially with 3rd party warehouses.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud : AVC_ variant condition key in sales and characteristic values assignment
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are not able to assign the variant condition key in sales pricing to the material characteristics values in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.  we are using Advanced Variant Configuration (AVC). 

Please advise on how to assign material characteristic values to the variant condition key in sales pricing.  We had attempted to create variant condition key in VC modelling environment and the same is used for pricing in condition record  creation using PVA0 condition type. However there is no linkage between selected material variants in the sales order and the applicable price increase due to this variant selection.  

I am missing the link between the material characteristic value and variant condition key in sales pricing. 

I had attached screenshot.

Please advise. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content:
HI,

I must confess that I don't really know how it could be clearer.

Anyway, let me rephrase: an IDoc is sent out via an output for an inbound delivery.

The relationship menu in the services for the object remains blank.

Cause for this is the object type for the IDoc, visible in table SRRELROLES, that is LIKP instead of being BUS2015.

Then, I created an entry in WE57 for the FM in the process code for the outbound IDoc (IDOC_OUTBOUND_DELVRY), the basic type/enhancement/message type/message variant/message function/object type (BUS2015)/Direction 1.

But this doesn't help, relationships remain blank when an IDoc is triggered for an inbound delivery as object type is still LIKP for the IBD in SRRELROLES.

BR

Yan

entry.title: Re: Hana2 sp7 - A calculation view has different behavior...
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for your reply.

We have the exact same data in both systems and and all the calculation views involved are also identical (the problem occurred after the transport). Btw we have found a workaround: The view CA_EXCHANGE_RATES_NEW contains another Hana view (from another schema) let's say the view XXX, if we load data from he view XXX into an hana table 'Table_A' and then we create a copy of the CA_EXCHANGE_RATES_NEW view (named CA_EXCHANGE_RATES_NEW_BIS) which uses 'Table_A', this new view works works perfectly also if we use this view in another calculation view.

Regards

entry.title: Manage Settlement Rules - Projects in SAP S4HANA Public edition - how to retrieve the list?
entry.content: Could you please help me find the list of settlement rules in S4HANA Public? In the on-premise version, I used SQVI with the tables PRPS and COBRB - COBRA to generate this report, which included the WBS Element and the associated Settlement Cost Center. The standard T-Code for this in on-premise was KOSRLIST_PR.

entry.title: Re: Enabling In-Order processing with SAP Integration Suite, advanced event mesh Partitioned Queues
entry.content:
Thank you @prashantrakheja for excellent blog.
Some consideration regarding the section "Why is 'exactly-once' messaging important for your business?".
As Cloud Integration of Integration Suite already supports Exactly Once QOS for Asynchronous scenarios for guaranteeing the consistency of business transactions, I would enphatize more the importance of exactly-once-in-order.
In fact what would happen if the tracking informations of the item purchased with loyalty points of FinTech company would not be processed if the correct sequence?
Another "real life" topic to address: let's consider the situation where partition1 is blocked for an error on message G1 and while the queue is "locked" by G1 processing the transactions carried by messages H1 and H2 are managed manually in "emergency mode" directly in the target system. In this case I would need to remove them from the queue before "unlocking" the partition1 otherwise I would receive unnecessary messages. Is it something that can be managed?

entry.title: How to post CSRF Token to SAP Standard ODATA to perform POST Operation ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I am working on a scenario where i want to Post BATCH in SAP S4 Hana System. 
Working on POSTMAN Tool : 
 

1. GET CSRF Token from the API and Put in the Header of Request 

2. x-csrf-token : _______________ and Basic Auth. 

 

It is working fine in the POSTMAN Tool 

In order to make this work on SAP CPI, I developed a iflow 

1. Hold Payload : Holds the JSON Payload 
2. XML to JSON : It converts JSON to XML for capturing the fields in XPATH
3. Content Modifier : It captures Xpath 
4. Content Modifier : 

 

5. Request Reply : It sends the GET Request to the API and gets the CSRF Token which will be later used to create POST Request. 

6. Content Modifier : (Capture Token) In this step we can log the retrieved CSRF Token by using ${header.x-csrf-token} 

7. Request Reply : In this step i am creating a POST Request to create Batch in which it is mandatory to send csrf token in the header. 

But when i am deploying the iflow and test it from postman i am getting error as "403 CSRF Token Validation Failed" 

So instead of using SAP API there i replaced it with a random webhook to see that what values i am passing in the header. 

I am getting CSRF Token there in the Header value. 
But why it is not working with SAP API. 

Please elaborate your views 

Regards, 
Prathmesh Sutar
prathmeshsutar.sapcpi@gmail.com

entry.title: Re: SAP Sales cloud Report : Issue with Standard Account...
entry.content:
Hello Moumita,

Did you do a transport of the analytical content that you have created? as you seem to have differences between tenants?

When creating your own key figure, i always define another key figure that represents a new counter for that new key figure.

The Calculate Result As, Calculate Single value As as well as the Aggregation Type have the  parameter = Counting All Detailed Values That are not Zero, Null or Error

I hope this is of help to you.

KR.

MJ

entry.title: Adding new field(difference between two dates) in output table
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to add a new field (difference between the two dates based on BEGDA and ENDDA) to the existing output table.

Any one can suggest.

regards,

Adi.

entry.title: Re: Characteristic and Class Assignment UIBB Missing from...
entry.content: The issue was solved by implementing SAP Note 3116199 - MDG-CLF: Classification UIBBs not visible.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano,

I'm Huong. I had the opportunity to work on the SAP system as a SAP FICO consultant. I really love working with SAP.

I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification.

I have finished the course in the learning journey: “Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA”

I hope you will consider my application for the free certification attempt.

My account is P2008484513, with the email (kaorichan9896@gmail.com

Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

My name is Duy Thanh Dao, i'm from Vietnam, currently a graduate student majoring in Computer Science. In the last 2 years, I realized I have a strong passion for SAP.
With the desire to improve my knowledge and professional skills in the SAP field and a long time of studying and researching, I was advised to take the "Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA" course for beginners. Therefore, I am writing this application to request a free voucher to take one SAP Global certification exam.
Participating in this course not only helps me develop myself but also has the opportunity to work at companies that use ERP SAP.
I commit to effectively use the knowledge from the course to bring the best value to the company and the community.
We look forward to receiving support from you.
Sincere thanks and best regards!

Wait for you.
------------------------
Duy Thanh Dao
+84907678234
duythanhdaoct@gmail.com

entry.title: Re: BOM explosion in firmed planned orders
entry.content: I used the function module MD_PLANNED_ORDER_CHANGE to trigger the BOM explode function

entry.title: Re: Purchase Leave configuration in SuccessFactors Time Off:
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for the expalined process, it is really helpfull!

I am stucked when the user is requesting the purchasing time.
I don't have the option tu fill the deduction period, it is missing this field.

Do you have any idea to solve this problem?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: What is the functionality of an Explicit trigger in A...
entry.content:
Hi,

Autoflows can be used for sending: Event notifications, Info notifications, Emails and approvals. It is also possible to update forecast categories within opportunities, using auto flow rules.

With regards to your question, the autoflow is not triggered on create or saved but: "Explicit Trigger -The rule is applied when you click Submit in the Autoflow case step. You must select Autoflow for step type in case type configuration."

Please check chapter 40 

CX_NG_CSS_SalesSolGuide.pdf (sap.com)

Kr.

MJ

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content: Hi @Anulipta - you must complete every step in the Tour the SAP Community 2024 tutorial and there is a wait time after joining SAP Community before you can write a blog post (you cannot join SAP Community and write a blog post in the same day). Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: BOM explosion in firmed planned orders
entry.content:
I used MD_PLDORD_CHANGE_BAPI to trigger explode BOM. 

CALL FUNCTION 'MD_PLDORD_CHANGE_BAPI'
  EXPORTING
    eplaf = VALUE plaf( )
    ecm61o = VALUE cm61o( bapco = '2' ) "will force a BOM explode 
    eplnum = "Planned order number
    ebapiplaf_i2x = VALUE bapiplaf_i2x( det_schedule = 'X' ) "Dummy change 
  EXCEPTIONS
    error_message.

Best regards
